headline: Brand & Identity Designer | Hand-Lettering | Owner, Laura Creates Studio
summary: Independent brand and identity designer and hand-letterer based in Dearborn, Michigan. Owner of Laura Creates Studio since 2022, working with small consumer brands and makers on logos, packaging, and complete brand systems. Four years freelance. B.F.A. in Communication Design from College for Creative Studies. Currently watching in-house brand designer roles around Detroit and remote while running the studio.
